## Feature idea

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why it would help

Explain how this would make the project more useful for learners.

## Suggested behavior

Describe how it should work in the app.

## Visualizer area

- [ ] Sorting
- [ ] Graph Traversal
- [ ] Heap
- [ ] Linked List
- [ ] State Machine
- [ ] New visualizer
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Extra notes

Add references, sketches, or examples if useful.
